title: Animated Totem
description: A simple texture pack that animates the totem of undying.
body:
It just animates the totem of undying.
![It just animates the totem of undying.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3272c14ea64e8de4b24d41019074180f8f6b1e4e.png)

If you want to change the animation speed, then open the **totem_of_undying.png.mcmeta** file along this path 
```
assets/minecraft/textures/item/totem_of_undying.png.mcmeta
```
 and enter any number here 
 
```
"frametime": 7
```
